Defendant Richard Feola Motion To Set Aside Default/Default Judgment/Leave To Defend
Off Calendar Nov-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RICHARD FEOLA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE IMPROPERLY TAKEN DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. 922-5939 specially appearing for pltf & opposing party; Cary D. McReynolds, Esq. of Peterson Martin Reynolds LLP 399-2900 for deft & moving party.

RULING: Argued and the Court granted the motion. Sanctions awarded to defendant for counsel's appearance on 11/01/11 in the amount of $275.00 (reduced from the $400.00 stated on 11/01/11) to be paid by 12/02/11. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND
Off Calendar Nov-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT RICHARD FEOLA'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE IMPROPERLY TAKEN DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT; REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS.

APPEARANCES: Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. 321-9025 specially appearing for pltf & opposing party; Cary D. McReynolds, Esq. of Peterson Martin Reynolds LLP 399-2900 for deft & moving party.

RULING: The Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the matter to 11/02/11 for plaintiff to provide courtesy copies of the opposition papers by 2:00pm today. Court intends to award reasonable costs incurred by the moving party in the amount of $400.00, to be included in tomorrow's ruling. No tentative ruling will be issued. Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-15-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Michael Begert, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha , CSR: C. Yount #2737

Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. specialy appeared for plaintiff National Investment Mortgage Fund, LLC.
Plaintiff's Witness: George Belleville, was placed under oath and direct examined.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Richard Feola as follows:

Damages/Principal - $182,991.22
Attorney Fees - $11,305.00
Costs - $1,205.00.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $195,501.22

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
